differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to assess neutrophil superoxide production
Measure serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and vaccine-specific antibody titers
Perform genetic testing (e.g., CYBB gene mutation analysis)
Conduct whole-body PET/CT scan to assess metabolic activity of lesions and guide surgical biopsy
Perform video-assisted thoracoscopic surgery (VATS) lung biopsy for histopathology and specialized cultures
Consult Immunology and Infectious Disease for evaluation of primary immunodeficiency

differential_diagnoses: Chronic Granulomatous Disease (CGD) with hypomorphic or adult-onset manifestation
Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to evaluate neutrophil respiratory burst capacity
Quantify serum immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM) and assess response to protein and polysaccharide vaccines
Consult Clinical Immunology for comprehensive primary immunodeficiency workup
Perform whole-body PET/CT to guide targeted surgical tissue biopsy
Obtain specialized molecular testing (e.g., Tropheryma whipplei PCR, Bartonella henselae PCR) on liver tissue
Assess serum ferritin and soluble IL-2 receptor levels to screen for secondary hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis
Perform genetic testing for primary immunodeficiency or autoinflammatory panels
